emails.subject: Q2 budget reallocation - need your proposal by Wednesday
emails.snippet: Ian, the board approved a 15% increase to the marketing budget for Q2 but they want it focused on pipeline generation. I need your proposal for how to reallocate across paid channels by EOD Wednesday. Include a scenario with and without LinkedIn.

emails.subject: Weekly performance summary - DataPulse Analytics
emails.snippet: Your campaigns spent $4,230 last week. Leads: 12 (down from 18 prior week). CPL: $352.50 (up 47%). Top campaign: 'Analytics Platform - Decision Makers' generated 5 leads. 3 campaigns have exhausted daily budgets.

emails.subject: Alert: Competitor bidding on your brand terms
emails.snippet: New advertisers are appearing for searches containing 'DataPulse'. Your average position for brand terms dropped from 1.0 to 1.3 last week. We recommend reviewing your brand campaign bids.

emails.subject: MQL quality from paid - we need to talk
emails.snippet: Ian, I had my SDR team audit the last 30 MQLs from paid channels. Only 8 were actually qualified. The rest were students, competitors, or people looking for free tools. Can we meet this week to align on targeting? This is hurting our pipeline numbers.

emails.subject: Weekly digest: #marketing, #paid-media, #general
emails.snippet: Top threads: Marketing team debating attribution model changes (23 replies). Paid-media: someone shared a competitor's new landing page. General: Chicago office snack survey results are in.

emails.subject: Ad copy approval needed - new product launch
emails.snippet: Hey Ian, I drafted the ad copy for the Insights Pro launch campaign. There are 4 RSAs and 6 LinkedIn variants in the shared doc. Could you review and approve by tomorrow so I can get them live for the March 17 launch? Link to doc attached.

emails.subject: Open enrollment closes March 21 - action required
emails.snippet: This is a reminder that open enrollment for health, dental, and vision benefits closes on March 21. If you don't make a selection, your current plan will auto-renew. Log in to BambooHR to review your options.

emails.subject: DataPulse Meta Ads - February performance report
emails.snippet: Hi Ian, attached is the February Meta Ads report. Highlights: $18.2K spend, 847 leads (up 12%), CPL $21.50. The lookalike audience from your customer list is outperforming by 3x. Recommend increasing budget. Full deck attached for your review before Thursday's meeting.

emails.subject: Let's meet Thursday to discuss lead quality
emails.snippet: Ian, following up on my earlier email. Are you free Thursday afternoon? I want to sit down with you and walk through the SDR audit data. Maybe 2pm? I'll send a calendar invite if that works.

emails.subject: Performance review self-assessment due March 17
emails.snippet: Your Q1 performance review cycle has started. Please complete your self-assessment in Lattice by March 17. Your manager review meeting with Sarah is scheduled for the week of March 24.

emails.subject: Approved: SMX Advanced conference in June
emails.snippet: Good news, your request to attend SMX Advanced in Seattle has been approved. Budget covers the $1,695 ticket and two nights hotel. Book through Navan and send receipts to finance.

emails.subject: Quick Q - should I pause the generic campaigns?
emails.snippet: The 'Analytics Software' generic campaign has a $180 CPL and 2% conversion rate. Kevin's team says these leads are especially low quality. Should I pause it now or wait until after the Q2 budget review? Don't want to make a call without your sign-off.

emails.subject: Monthly account summary - DataPulse Analytics
emails.snippet: February summary: $32,450 spend, 1,247 clicks, 89 conversions, $364.61 CPA. Brand campaigns: $4.20 CPA. Generic campaigns: $180.33 CPA. Competitor campaigns: $95.00 CPA. Optimization score: 72%.

emails.subject: Team lunch Friday - who's in?
emails.snippet: Hey team! Thinking lunch at Portillo's on Friday to celebrate the Insights Pro launch going live. 12:30pm work? Reply if you're in so I can make a reservation.

emails.subject: Re: Let's meet Thursday - sending invite for 2pm
emails.snippet: Great, 2pm Thursday works. I'll book the Wacker conference room and send a calendar invite. I'll bring the SDR audit spreadsheet. Heads up, I also invited Sarah since this ties into the Q2 budget discussion.

calendar.title: 1:1 with Sarah (CMO)
calendar.description: Weekly 1:1. Q2 budget proposal, LinkedIn performance, Insights Pro launch timeline.

calendar.title: Meridian Agency - Meta Ads review
calendar.description: Monthly Meta Ads performance review with agency partner. Review February report, discuss budget increase.

calendar.title: Focus time - Q2 budget proposal
calendar.description: Protected focus block. Build Q2 paid media budget proposal for Sarah. Include LinkedIn scenarios.

calendar.title: Q1 Campaign Review
calendar.description: Full Q1 campaign review. Performance by channel, ROI analysis, lessons learned. Present to CMO and VP Sales.

calendar.title: Focus time - campaign optimization
calendar.description: Protected block. Review search terms, pause underperformers, prep Insights Pro launch campaigns.

calendar.title: Vendor demo - Attribution platform
calendar.description: Demo of ClarityLabs attribution platform. Evaluating as replacement for current last-click model.

calendar.title: Focus time - self-assessment
calendar.description: Complete Lattice self-assessment for Q1 performance review.

calendar.title: Team lunch - Portillo's
calendar.description: Celebrating Insights Pro launch going live.
